expectations.text: Claude calls minigraf_transact at least once
expectations.evidence: No tool calls of any kind appear in the response. Claude only provides a prose architecture summary and table without calling minigraf_transact.

expectations.text: Relationship values are entity idents (keywords starting with :project/) not quoted strings
expectations.evidence: No transact calls were made, so no entity idents were used. The response contains no graph storage of any kind.

expectations.text: At least 3 entity-reference edges are stored (calls or depends-on with keyword values)
expectations.evidence: No edges were stored. The response is a plain prose/table summary with no graph operations.

expectations.text: Each component entity is tagged with :entity-type :type/component
expectations.evidence: No entities were stored in the graph at all, so no :entity-type tagging occurred.

expectations.text: Claude uses flat attribute names (:calls, :depends-on, :name) not namespaced attributes
expectations.evidence: No transact calls were made, so no attribute names were used in graph operations.
